projectDescription: An open-source framework by Google/Firebase for building production-ready AI-powered applications in JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, and Python, with a unified plugin system, type-safe flows, and built-in observability.
keyFeatures: Unified AI model interface supporting Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, OpenAI-compatible models, Ollama, and more
Type-safe flows with automatic input/output schema validation using Zod (JS) or Pydantic (Python)
Agentic tool calling with automatic multi-turn reasoning loops
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) with built-in embedder and retriever abstractions
Dotprompt — YAML-frontmatter + Handlebars prompt file format with versioning and variants
Local Developer UI and CLI for testing, inspecting traces, and running evaluations
OpenTelemetry-based tracing and production monitoring via Google Cloud or third-party backends
Plugin system for extending models, telemetry, vector stores, and integrations
Model Context Protocol (MCP) support for dynamic tool discovery
publicApiSurface: genkit() / Genkit constructor — JS/TS entry point
ai.definePrompt() / ai.prompt() — manage prompts and dotprompt files
ai.embed() / ai.retrieve() / ai.index() — RAG pipeline primitives
ai.defineEmbedder() / ai.defineRetriever() / ai.defineIndexer() — custom RAG components
GenkitOptions { plugins, model, promptDir, context } — initialization config
